title: Leading Design for the First Commercial-Scale Electric Ammonia Plant on the U.S. Gulf Coast
content: Worley has been selected by First Ammonia to deliver the front-end engineering design (FEED) for the first commercial-scale electric ammonia plant in Victoria, Texas. The facility, with an initial capacity of 300 metric tonnes per day, will use solid oxide electrolyzer technology (SOEC), which is 30% more energy-efficient than conventional methods. Designed to integrate renewable energy and stabilize the local grid, the plant represents a major step in decarbonizing heavy industry and power generation. The FEED study is set for completion by Q1 2025, with construction starting later this year. The collaboration highlights Worleyâ€™s expertise and First Ammoniaâ€™s commitment to scalable, clean ammonia production.
author: Analysts Account
